lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨ ਕੀ ਬਾਤ ਸੁਨੀ ਪੇਖੀ ਸੁਪਨਾ ਨਾਮ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: supan kee baat sunee pekhee supanaa naam mantru satiguroo drirraaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When I was dreaming, I heard and saw only dream-objects. The True Guru has implanted the Mantra of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸਰਨਿ ਚਰਨ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saadh saran charan chit laaeaa |
lines.english: In the Sanctuary of the Holy, I focus my consciousness on the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਨੋ ਰਾਜ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਧਨਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: neh tripataano raaj joban dhan bahur bahur fir dhaaeaa |
lines.english: Power, youth and wealth do not bring satisfaction; people chase after them again and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਸਭ ਬੁਝੀ ਹੈ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sukh paaeaa trisanaa sabh bujhee hai saant paaee gun gaaeaa |1|
lines.english: I have found peace and tranquility, and all my thirsty desires have been quenched, singing His Glorious Praises. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਪਸੂ ਕੀ ਨਿਆਈ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਬਿਆਪਿਓ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin boojhe pasoo kee niaaee bhram mohi biaapio maaeaa |
lines.english: Without understanding, they are like beasts, engrossed in doubt, emotional attachment and Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਜਮ ਜੇਵਰੀ ਕਾਟੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੨॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: saadhasang jam jevaree kaattee naanak sehaj samaaeaa |2|10|
lines.english: But in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the noose of Death is cut, O Nanak, and one intuitively merges in celestial peace. ||2||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har ke charan hiradai gaae |
lines.english: Sing of the Lord's Feet within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲਾ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਨਿਤ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: seetalaa sukh saant moorat simar simar nit dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditate, meditate in constant remembrance on God, the Embodiment of soothing peace and cooling tranquility. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨ ਅਨੇਕ ਕਿਰਿਆ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: pun daan anek kiriaa saadhoo sang samaae |
lines.english: Immerse yourself in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and you shall obtain the benefits of giving charitable gifts, and all sorts of good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਆਸ ਹੋਤ ਪੂਰਨ ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sagal aas hot pooran kott janam dukh jaae |1|
lines.english: All your hopes shall be fulfilled, and the pain of millions of deaths and births shall be gone. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਪ ਸੰਤਾਪ ਮਿਟੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਖਾਇ ॥੨॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: taap santaap mitte naanak baahurr kaal na khaae |2|11|
lines.english: Sorrow and suffering shall be erased, O Nanak, and you shall never again be devoured by death. ||2||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮ ਜੋਤਿ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pooran param jot paramesur simarat paaeeai maan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Perfect Supreme Divine Light, the Transcendent Lord God, honor and glory are obtained. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥੀਐ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: katheeai santasang prabh giaan |
lines.english: Speak of God's Wisdom in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਹੋਹਿ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: patit puneet hohi khin bheetar paarabraham kai rang |1|
lines.english: Sinners are sanctified in an instant, in the love of the Supreme Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਜਾਤ ਰਹੇ ਸ੍ਰਮ ਨਾਸੇ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: aavat jaat rahe sram naase simarat saadhoo sang |
lines.english: One's comings and goings in reincarnation cease, and suffering is dispelled, meditating in remembrance in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਕਥੈ ਸੁਨੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo kathai sunai har keeratan taa kee duramat naas |
lines.english: Whoever speaks and listens to the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises is rid of evil-mindedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਆਸ ॥੨॥੧॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath paavai naanak pooran hovai aas |2|1|12|
lines.english: All hopes and desires, O Nanak, are fulfilled. ||2||1||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat nidh har ko naam |
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is found in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਜੀਅ ਕੈ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sang sahaaee jeea kai kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It is the Companion of the soul, its Helper and Support. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਹਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilabikh harai |1|
lines.english: the sins of countless incarnations are washed away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਊਚੀ ਬਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kee aoochee baanee |
lines.english: The words of the humble Saints are lofty and exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਰੇਨੁ ਨਿਤਿ ਮਜਨੁ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant ren nit majan karai |
lines.english: Continually bathing in the dust of the feet of the Saints,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maan tan dhan praan prabh ke simarat dukh jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Mind, body, wealth and the breath of life - all come from God; remembering Him in meditation, pain is taken away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo har hare gun gaae |
lines.english: O Holy people, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Haray.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਤਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: simar simar tare naanak praanee |2|2|13|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance, O Nanak, mortal beings are carried across and saved. ||2||2||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਤ ਊਤ ਕਹਾ ਲੋੁਭਾਵਹਿ ਏਕ ਸਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eet aoot kahaa loubhaaveh ek siau man laae |1|
lines.english: Why are you entangled in this and that? Let your mind be attuned to the One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਆਇਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਹੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੩॥੩॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: sagal tiaag saran aaeo naanak lehu milaae |3|3|14|
lines.english: O Nanak, I have abandoned everything and come to Your Sanctuary. Please let me merge with You. ||3||3||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਸੰਤ ਆਸਨੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mahaa pavitr sant aasan mil sang gobid dhiaae |2|
lines.english: The place of the Saints is utterly sacred; meet with them, and meditate on the Lord of the Universe. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਿ ਪੇਖਿ ਬਿਗਸਾਉ ਸਾਜਨ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਨਾ ਇਕਾਂਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pekh pekh bigasaau saajan prabh aapanaa ikaant |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Gazing upon and beholding my Best Friend, I blossom forth in bliss; my God is the One and Only. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨਦਾ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਨ ਨਾਹੀ ਭਾਂਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aanadaa sukh sehaj moorat tis aan naahee bhaant |1|
lines.english: He is the Image of Ecstasy, Intuitive Peace and Poise. There is no other like Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਤ ਇਕ ਬਾਰ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਟਿ ਕੋਟਿ ਕਸਮਲ ਜਾਂਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: simarat ik baar har har mitt kott kasamal jaant |2|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, Har, Har, even once, millions of sins are erased. ||2||
